subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses, made manifest the signs, and caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر العلامات و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @personal instructions, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
